steps.name: Add as new item prompt and partial match
steps.criteria: QuickAdd shows 'Add X as new item' row when no staple matches AND when partial matches exist
steps.scenario_name: "Add as new item" row appears when typed name has no staple match

steps.name: Bottom sheet opens with form fields
steps.criteria: Tapping 'Add as new item' opens Modal with type toggle, area picker, section input, aisle input, Add Item button
steps.scenario_name: bottom sheet opens with form fields when "Add as new item" is tapped

steps.name: Submit as staple saves to library and trip
steps.criteria: Filling form as staple and submitting saves to staple library AND adds to trip
steps.scenario_name: submitting as staple saves to library and adds to trip

steps.name: Submit as one-off adds to trip only
steps.criteria: Filling form as one-off and submitting adds to trip but NOT staple library
steps.scenario_name: submitting as one-off adds to trip but not to staple library

steps.name: Context-aware defaults and skip shortcut
steps.criteria: Sweep mode pre-fills Staple + active area. Whiteboard mode defaults One-off + no area. Skip adds with defaults. Overrides work.
steps.scenario_name: sweep mode pre-fills staple type and active area

steps.name: Section auto-suggest from staple library
steps.criteria: Section input shows suggestions from previously used sections. Prefix match. Tap fills field.
steps.scenario_name: previously used section appears as suggestion on prefix match

steps.name: Duplicate staple detection and recovery
steps.criteria: Adding staple with same name+area shows warning. 'Add to trip instead' uses existing metadata. Cancel returns to form.
steps.scenario_name: duplicate detected when same name and area exist

steps.name: Validation and edge cases
steps.criteria: Submit blocked without area or section. Aisle optional. Dismiss adds nothing. QuickAdd clears after submit.
steps.scenario_name: submit blocked when area is not selected
